reason: The figure-critic subagent (Agent(subagent_type=figure-critic)) is not callable from this orbit-agent runtime environment — no Task / Agent tool is exposed to the agent. The agent self-verified both figures by reading the PNGs back with the Read tool: narrative.png shows a clean GP mean + 95% CI band over the 50 training points with annotated learned hyperparameters; results.png is a 3-panel quantitative comparison (prediction overlay, residual scatter with sign coding, log-scale MSE bar chart vs baseline and target). Both files are above the size/DPI thresholds (narrative ≈ 164 KB, results ≈ 290 KB at 180 dpi).
